name: L-2 fetcher writes a resumable cursor file at .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/cursors/<source>.json after a successful fetch
command: printf '{"number":101,"merged":true}\n{"number":102,"merged":true}\n' > stub.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/fetch.sh" --source stripe-node --upstream-stub stub.jsonl --out out.jsonl --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z 2>err.txt && [ -f .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/cursors/stripe-node.json ] && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(".claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/cursors/stripe-node.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.last_pr_number===102?0:1)' && echo persisted 1>&2
